author: Will Deacon <will@kernel.org>
description: IOMMU API for ARM architected SMMU implementations
name: arm_smmu
parm: disable_bypass:Disable bypass streams such that incoming transactions from devices that are not attached to an iommu domain will report an abort back to the device and will not be allowed to pass through the SMMU.

force_stage:Force SMMU mappings to be installed at a particular stage of translation. A value of '1' or '2' forces the corresponding stage. All other values are ignored (i.e. no stage is forced). Note that selecting a specific stage will disable support for nested translation.

name: rmnet_shs
parm: rmnet_shs_cpu_inst_rate_max_pkts:Max pkts in a burst before prioritizing
rmnet_shs_cpu_max_coresum:Max coresum seen of each core
rmnet_shs_cpu_max_qdiff:Max queue length seen of each core
rmnet_shs_cpu_qhead_diff:SHS nw stack queue processed diff
rmnet_shs_cpu_rx_bps:SHS stamp enq rate per CPU
rmnet_shs_cpu_rx_pkts:SHS stamp total pkts per CPU
rmnet_shs_cpu_rx_pps:SHS stamp pkt enq rate per CPU
rmnet_shs_fall_back_timer:Option to enable fall back limit for parking
rmnet_shs_filter_count:LL filter count seen in ll rmnet_shs
rmnet_shs_flow_rx_bps:SHS stamp enq rate per flow
rmnet_shs_flow_rx_pkts:SHS stamp total pkts per flow
rmnet_shs_flow_rx_pps:SHS stamp pkt enq rate per flow
rmnet_shs_flush_reason:rmnet shs skb flush trigger type
rmnet_shs_inst_rate_interval:Max interval we sample for instant burst prioritizing
rmnet_shs_inst_rate_switch:Configurable option to enable rx rate cpu switching
rmnet_shs_ll_pkts:LL packets seen in ll rmnet_shs
rmnet_shs_max_core_wait:Max wait module will wait during move to perf core in ms
rmnet_shs_max_flow_inactivity_sec:Max flow inactive time before clean up
rmnet_shs_max_qmap_pkt:Max interleaved ipa pkts shs will be park for (ms)
rmnet_shs_max_qmap_pkt:Max interleaved ipa pkts shs will park
rmnet_shs_pb_boost_timer_ms:Duration that PB Boost will be active for before reset
rmnet_shs_switch_reason:rmnet shs skb core swtich type
rmnet_shs_timeout:Option to configure fall back duration
